# Generated by Codex from vanilla estate privilege definitions.

pie_et_sgui_select_grant_privilege_nobles_land_rights = {
	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_nobles_land_rights }
	effect = { pie_et_select_grant_privilege_nobles_land_rights = yes }
}

	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_nobles_land_rights }

}

	effect = { pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_autonomous_local_commanders = yes }
}

pie_et_sgui_select_grant_privilege_mam_muhtasibs = {
	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_mam_muhtasibs }
	effect = { pie_et_select_grant_privilege_mam_muhtasibs = yes }
}

pie_et_sgui_select_revoke_privilege_mam_muhtasibs = {
	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_mam_muhtasibs }
	effect = { pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_mam_muhtasibs = yes }
}

pie_et_sgui_select_grant_privilege_trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege = {
	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege }
	effect = { pie_et_select_grant_privilege_trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege = yes }
}

pie_et_sgui_select_revoke_privilege_trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege = {
	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege }
	effect = { pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_trunk_road_to_erzurum_privilege = yes }
}

	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_cas_mita_system }
	effect = { pie_et_select_grant_privilege_cas_mita_system = yes }
}

	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_cas_mita_system }
	effect = { pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_cas_mita_system = yes }
}

	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_royal_factories_privilege }
	effect = { pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_royal_factories_privilege = yes }
}

	effect = { pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_ira_iranian_art_patronage = yes }

pie_et_sgui_select_grant_privilege_guild_investments = {
	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pg_guild_investments }
	effect = { pie_et_select_grant_privilege_guild_investments = yes }
}

pie_et_sgui_select_revoke_privilege_guild_investments = {
	scope = country
	is_valid = { has_variable = pie_et_pr_guild_investments }
	effect = { pie_et_select_revoke_privilege_guild_investments = yes }
